title: 3 Pcs 180cm Pink Artificial Silk Cherry Blossom Garland Vines Hanging Vine Garland Artificial Flowers,Fake Floral garland for Outdoor Indoor Wedding Wall Badroom Ceremony Home Wedding Decoration
features: 【Package Included】You will receive 3pcs aartificial cherry flower garland,one garland with total length of 180cm,creating a vibrant natural spring scene,suitable for any occasion.

【Quality Material】The pink artificial cherry blossoms flowers garland flowers and leaves of this branches of flower garland are made of fine fabric,the stems are made of pvc,not easy to fade,durable and can be reused in multiple events.
【Cherry Blossom Design】Cherry blossoms are colourful and evergreen,the lifelike flesh pink petals are full,soft and realistic,bringing a fresh and light feeling to your space.

【Easy to Use】Each wreath length is flexible and can be bent,twisted or cut to meet your specific decorative needs.Lightweight and easy to hang with the included hooks or straps.Artificial flowers may be squeezed and deformed during shipping,you can adjust the branches to the most natural state after receiving the goods.

【Wide Use】You can hang the pink artificial cherry blossom flowers on the wall,door,swing,mirror,fence,or anywhere you like.Suitable for home,garden,wedding party,wedding arch,window,shop,restaurant,office,flower basket,party,celebration,aisle,staircase,fence and many other occasions
description: Product description Material: PVC,Fabric Colour: Pink Quantity: 3pcs Notes: 1.Please allow slight deviation due to manual measurement. 2.Due to the difference of different light and monitor,there may be a slight colour difference,please understand. 3.Artificial flowers may be squeezed and deformed during transport,you can adjust the branches to the most natural state after receiving. Safety Warning Artificial flowers may be squeezed and deformed during transport. Adjust the branches to their natural state after receiving the product.
